format.label: Formatting
format.description: Whitespace, indentation, line wrapping, and import ordering

lint.label: Linting
lint.description: Static analysis for likely bugs and bad patterns

code-quality.label: Code Quality
code-quality.description: Complexity limits, dead code detection, and duplication checks

ai-slop.label: AI Slop
ai-slop.description: Narrative comments, dead patterns, unsafe type casts, TODO stubs, generic names

security.label: Security
security.description: Secret leaks, risky APIs, and dependency vulnerabilities

diagnostics.message: File too large (max: 400)
diagnostics.help: Consider splitting this file into smaller modules

scoreImpact.rationale: Large files are reviewability pressure, but size alone is not a confirmed defect.

diagnostics.message: Function nested too deeply (max: 5)
diagnostics.help: Consider using early returns or extracting nested logic

scoreImpact.rationale: Deep nesting makes behavior harder to reason about and is more actionable than pure size.

diagnostics.message: Trivial comment that restates the code
diagnostics.help: Remove comments that don't add information beyond what the code already expresses

scoreImpact.rationale: Restating comments are style noise; keep the finding visible but score gently.

diagnostics.message: Empty catch block swallows errors silently
diagnostics.help: Handle errors explicitly: log with context, rethrow, or return an error value

scoreImpact.rationale: Swallowed failures hide real broken states and deserve full scoring impact.

diagnostics.message: console.log/debug/info statement left in production code
diagnostics.help: Remove debugging console statements or replace with a proper logger

scoreImpact.rationale: Leftover debug output is visible cleanup unless it leaks sensitive data.

diagnostics.help: Remove unused imports to keep the code clean

scoreImpact.rationale: Unused imports are mechanical cleanup.

diagnostics.message: Narrative comment block (decorative separator)
diagnostics.help: Remove — narrative/decorative comments belong in PR descriptions, not source. Code should be self-explanatory.

scoreImpact.rationale: Narrative comments are cleanup/style findings rather than defects.

scoreImpact.rationale: Narrative comments are cleanup/style findings rather than defects.

diagnostics.message: Chained `.get(..., {})` defaults hide missing-data cases.
diagnostics.help: Normalize the input at the boundary, use a typed object, or split the lookup into explicit steps. Empty-dict fallback chains are a common agent shortcut that becomes brittle as schemas evolve.

scoreImpact.rationale: Chained dict fallback hides shape assumptions and deserves review.
